# Development Analysis Decision

## Summary

The consolidation largely meets the plan: 22 sphinx files (down from 38), per-page caps met, deleted cross-references all rewritten, production-code error messages no longer reference the 5 named deleted files (policy-v2.md, parallel-mode.md, policy-explanation.md, watchdogs-and-timeouts.md, pro-contract.md), the 12 affected pytest files all pass (205 passed, 3 skipped in 1.09s, well under the 60s budget), and the 10549-test suite passes (25.24s, under budget). However, two acceptance criteria fail: (1) AC-02 sphinx-build with -W --keep-going exits non-zero in a CLEAN state because a stray 'ce:' was appended to the end of ralph-workflow/docs/sphinx/modules.rst at line 3350 by this implementation commit (a53484fec) — the diff shows the only change to the trailing 3 lines is '+ce:'. This breaks 'make docs' (exit 2) and therefore 'make verify' (exit 2) in a clean state. The build only succeeds in an incremental rebuild because sphinx uses a cached pickle environment and skips re-reading modules.rst. (2) AC-05 Public surfaces total 380 lines (107+48+30+49+34+59+53), exceeding the 285-line cap. Each per-page cap is met individually, but the cumulative total is over.

## Status

request_changes

## What Came Up Short

- [Plan Compliance / Verification Evidence] ralph-workflow/docs/sphinx/modules.rst has a stray 'ce:' appended at line 3350 (the file ends with '.. automodule:: ralph.pro_support.state_query' followed by an extra 'ce:' line). The git diff for this commit (a53484fec) shows the only change to the trailing 3 lines of modules.rst is '+ce:', confirming this is a regression introduced by the implementation, not pre-existing. Running 'cd ralph-workflow && rm -rf docs/sphinx/_build && make docs' exits with code 2: 'modules.rst:3350: WARNING: Explicit markup ends without a blank line; unexpected unindent. [docutils]' and 'build finished with problems, 1 warning (with warnings treated as errors). make: *** [docs] Error 1'.
- [Plan Compliance / Verification Evidence] Because 'make verify' depends on 'docs' (Makefile line 232: 'verify: verify-drift docs'), 'cd ralph-workflow && rm -rf docs/sphinx/_build && make verify' also exits with code 2. AC-02 (sphinx build with -W --keep-going exits 0) and AC-03 (make verify exits 0) are therefore not met in a clean state. The earlier passing 'make verify' I observed was running against a populated _build cache, so sphinx-build skipped re-reading modules.rst and the warning was not raised.
- [Plan Compliance] AC-05 requires 'Public surfaces total less than 285 lines and positioning is stated once.' Measured sum: README.md=107 + START_HERE.md=48 + docs/README.md=30 + ralph-workflow/README.md=49 + ralph-workflow/docs/README.md=34 + docs/agents/README.md=59 + ralph-workflow/docs/agents/README.md=53 = 380 lines. Each per-page cap is met individually, but the cumulative 380 exceeds the 285 cap.
- [Plan Compliance / Maintainability] Sphinx also emits a softer warning during a clean build: 'mcp-architecture.md: document is referenced in multiple toctrees: ["developer-internals", "index"], selecting: index'. This is not a -W error in the current configuration (sphinx silently selected index), but the file is referenced in both the main toctree (Understand section, line 56) and inside ralph-workflow/docs/sphinx/developer-internals.md, which is a structural inconsistency the plan's step 24 (intent-routed 6-section toctree) should have removed.

## How To Fix

- Remove the stray 'ce:' from the end of ralph-workflow/docs/sphinx/modules.rst. The last line should be '   :show-inheritance:' (the option line for the ralph.pro_support.state_query automodule directive); the line after it that contains only 'ce:' must be deleted. Then run 'cd ralph-workflow && rm -rf docs/sphinx/_build && make docs' and confirm exit 0 with no 'WARNING' line in the output. This unblocks AC-02 and AC-03 in a clean state.
- Reduce the total lines of the 7 public surfaces to under 285. Current sum 380 — needs to drop by ~95 lines. Targets: README.md 107->80 (trim the bullet lists in 'Trust and safety boundaries' and the 'Start your first run' walkthrough to one-line pointers + link), ralph-workflow/docs/agents/README.md 53->40, docs/agents/README.md 59->45, and START_HERE.md 48->35. Keep the per-file caps the plan already met; only collapse extra words, not whole sections. Re-verify by running: 'wc -l README.md START_HERE.md docs/README.md ralph-workflow/README.md ralph-workflow/docs/README.md docs/agents/README.md ralph-workflow/docs/agents/README.md' and assert the sum is under 285.
- Remove the duplicate mcp-architecture.md toctree entry from ralph-workflow/docs/sphinx/developer-internals.md (the :doc:`mcp-architecture` reference inside its inline toctree). Keep only the canonical entry in ralph-workflow/docs/sphinx/index.rst 'Understand' section. Re-run 'cd ralph-workflow && rm -rf docs/sphinx/_build && make docs' and confirm the 'referenced in multiple toctrees' warning is gone.
